message:
fix: orphans command manages its own JSONL freshness via allow-stale plumbing

Move auto-import responsibility from the global pre-dispatch hook into
orphans' own execute_inner, so it can honour allow_stale and the
per-repo no_auto_import config. Adds allow_stale field to CliOverrides
and updates should_auto_import to exclude orphans. E2e test confirms
a JSONL-closed issue is imported before orphan scanning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1698,6 +1698,7 @@ pub struct CliOverrides {
     pub json: Option<bool>,
     pub display_color: Option<bool>,
     pub quiet: Option<bool>,
+    pub allow_stale: Option<bool>,
     pub no_db: Option<bool>,
     pub no_daemon: Option<bool>,
     pub no_auto_flush: Option<bool>,
@@ -3155,6 +3156,7 @@ labels:
             json: Some(true),
             display_color: None,
             quiet: None,
+            allow_stale: None,
             no_db: Some(true),
             no_daemon: Some(true),
             no_auto_flush: Some(true),
